actions.expression:
SELECT krshsheet.rid,
       krshsheet.pid,
       ks.hbdm,
       ks.yhhl,
       krshsheet.fphm,
       krshsheet.wxht,
       krshsheet.sydje,
       krshsheet.chyrq,
       krshsheet.shts,
       krshsheet.htje,
       krshsheet.myjje,
       krshsheet.ayjje,
       krshsheet.yjje,
       krshsheet.wsje,
       krshsheet.syrq,
       krshsheet.syqje,
       krshsheet.skyh,
       krshsheet.yhfy,
       krshsheet.yhje,
       krshsheet.ywry,
       krshsheet.sygs,
       krshsheet.ywbm,
       krshsheet.sybz,
       krshsheet.sfdr,
       krshsheet.sh,
       krshsheet.hjsh,
       krshsheet.sfjq,
       krshsheet.sfdj,
       krshsheet.sydje1,
       krshsheet.qsn,
       krshsheet.qsy,
       krshsheet.hzgx,
       krshsheet.fphm1,
       krshsheet.htjer,
       krshsheet.htjem,
       krshsheet.djjer,
       krshsheet.djjeM,
       krshsheet.djjemZ,
       krshsheet.djjerZ,
       krshsheet.fpjq,
       krshsheet.RMBkh,
       krshsheet.sydje2,
       krshsheet.qsny,
       krshsheet.ywpath,
       ks.kh_id,
       ks.khmc,
       ks.djrq,
       ks.djdh,
       fg.shsd,
       fg.sfjd
FROM krshsheet 
LEFT 
JOIN (
SELECT krsh.kh_id,
       krsh.khmc,
       krsh.djrq,
       krsh.djdh,
       krsh.rid,
       krsh.yhhl,
       krsh.hbdm
FROM krsh) as ks 
  ON (krshsheet.pid=ks.rid) 
LEFT 
JOIN (
SELECT fpgl.wxfp,fpgl.shsd,fpgl.sfjd 
FROM fpgl) as fg 
  ON (krshsheet.fphm=fg.wxfp) 
WHERE ((krshsheet.fphm=[定金调整.发票号码]) 
  OR (krshsheet.wxht=[定金调整.外销合同])) 
  AND (krshsheet.ywry=[定金调整.经手人名]) 
  AND (krshsheet.sfdj="是") 
ORDER BY krshsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-使用金额￥
actions.caption: 计算-使用金额￥
actions.expression: [定金调整.详细用途.使用外汇]*[定金调整.详细用途.银行汇率]
actions.output: 定金调整.详细用途.使用金额￥

actions.name: 计算-银行合计
actions.caption: 计算-银行合计
actions.expression: [定金调整.详细用途.银行费用$]*[定金调整.详细用途.银行汇率]
actions.output: 定金调整.详细用途.银行合计

view.params:
SELECT krshsheet.fphm
FROM krsh,krshsheet
WHERE   (krshsheet.sfdj="是")
   AND  (krshsheet.ywry=:_user_username_)
group by krshsheet.fphm

SELECT krshsheet.wxht
FROM krshsheet
WHERE   (krshsheet.sfdj="是")
   AND  (krshsheet.ywry=:_user_username_)
group by krshsheet.wxht
